     The Numbers Business Report

Easter Sunday (2022)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $13,013,690Details
International Box Office $8,169
Worldwide Box Office $13,021,859
Further financial details...

Synopsis

A man returns home for an Easter celebration with his riotous, bickering, eating, drinking, laughing, loving family, in this love letter to his Filipino-American community.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$5,447,130 (41.9% of total gross)
Legs:2.39 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:99.9% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$17,000,000 (worldwide box office is 0.8 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,175 opening theaters/3,176 max. theaters, 2.8 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $14,780,981

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: August 5th, 2022 (Wide) by Universal
International Releases: August 4th, 2022 (Wide), released as Que a Festa Comece! (Portugal)
August 5th, 2022 (Limited) (United Kingdom)
December 28th, 2022 (Limited) (South Korea)
Video Release: October 4th, 2022 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for some strong language, and suggestive references.
(Rating bulletin 2736 (cert #53811), 6/15/2022)
Plot point: Aspiring Actress / Actor, Dysfunctional Family
Social setting: Easter
Subgenre: Family Comedy
Target audience: Asian-Americans
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: DreamWorks Pictures
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
